chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1261 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.5868/2025 (C/A) 16-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Ghulam Murtaza Shah, District Education Officer (ES&HS), Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Perusal of the Contempt Application bearing CMA No.5868/2025 reflects that nowhere the Petitioner has mentioned that he himself has complied with the said judgment by approaching the Chief Secretary to Government of Sindh by filing an application. Under the circumstances, no case for contempt is made out, resultantly, the contempt application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
